SEARCH
Package qsim

Class Parameters

java.lang.Object
qsim.Parameters
public class Parameters extends Object
Model parameters and algorithm parameters. The parameter values can be supplied via the Java command line (using the Java -Dname=val syntax), or via a config file.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) static enum 
    Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened
    The legal values for the configuration parameter "policy.countCurrentlyScreened", which is used to control how the customer that's currently being screened is counted for the purposes of measuring the queue length
    static class 
    Parameters.ParseException
    Thrown when an error is found in the config file
    (package private) static enum 
    Parameters.Policy
    The available policies for the selection of screener profiles

  • Field Details

    • L

      public final int L
      The number of screening lanes

    • lambda

      public final double lambda
      Customer arrival rate (avg customers per unit of time, per lane). Poisson distribution

    • lambdaGrowthRate

      public final double lambdaGrowthRate
      Indicates the rate of change of lambda with time (linear growth or decrease). Zero means constant lambda.

    • nGenMax

      public final int nGenMax
      The total number of arrivals to generate in each lane, after which the generator stops. If 0, never stop generating arrivals.

    • fracBad

      public final double fracBad
      The fraction of "bad" customers among the arrivals

    • dAcceptable

      public final double dAcceptable

    • profiles

      final ScreenerProfile[] profiles
      All profiles that can be available to any screening device. Each individual lane may have all or some of these profiles at its disposal; the choice of the profile to be used by each lane at any given time is controlled by the system's policy.

    • profileIndexes

      final int[][] profileIndexes
      For Lane j, profileIndexes[j] contains the list of profiles (zero-bases indexes into profiles[]) supported by that lane. If profileIndexes[j]==null, it means that Lane j supports all profiles in profiles[].

    • policy

      final Parameters.Policy policy
      The screening profile selection policy

    • countCurrentlyScreened

      final Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened countCurrentlyScreened
      How the customer that's currently being screened is counted for the purposes of measuring the queue length

  • Constructor Details

    • Parameters

      public Parameters(File f) throws IOException
      Initializes the parameters from a file or from system properties.
      Parameters:
      f - file object; may be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the data are not like expected
      IOException
